value: JSONL at ~/.codexcli/audit.jsonl. Captures before/after values, success/fail, scope, agent identity, enriched metrics (duration, responseSize, hit/miss, redundant, entryCount). CLI reads (get, search, stale) also logged. codex_audit (MCP) + ccli audit (CLI) to query with --detailed. Encrypted values masked, passwords redacted. CLI uses sync writes to guarantee log durability on process exit.
